title: Oceanos Ntua - National Technical University of Athens - Greece
section_path: Oceanos Ntua - National Technical University of Athens - Greece
section_path_text: Oceanos Ntua - National Technical University of Athens - Greece
summary:
Main
in Recent Videos 27/06/2024
Oceanos - NTUA was established in 2016 and comprises 70 undergraduate students from various institutions.Located at the NTUA campus, the team is organized into five sub-teams. They actively participated in the HydroContest for two years (2017-18) and have been involved in the MEBC since then. Their notable achievement includes securing 2nd place overall in 2023, with three 1st place wins.
